mapper.sql: select id, session_id, record_id, behavior_type, behavior_count, behavior_time, behavior_data from sc_exam_behavior_log
mapper.insert: insert into sc_exam_behavior_log(session_id, record_id, behavior_type, behavior_count, behavior_time, behavior_data, create_by, create_time, remark) values(#{sessionId}, #{recordId}, #{behaviorType}, #{behaviorCount}, #{behaviorTime}, #{behaviorData}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark})
